instruction: Write Drizzle queries with proper operator helpers, transactions, upserts, and type-safe patterns
relevant_when: Agent writes Drizzle ORM queries, transactions, or data access code
context: Use eq(), and(), inArray(), desc(), asc() from 'drizzle-orm' for all conditions and ordering -- never raw SQL strings. Transactions must use the tx parameter for all operations inside db.transaction(), not the outer db. Destructure .returning() as an array. Use onConflictDoUpdate for upserts instead of check-then-insert. Update updatedAt with SQL expressions (sql`datetime('now')`) not JavaScript Date. Use batch .values([]) for multi-row inserts. Use InferSelectModel/InferInsertModel for type extraction.

checklist.name: operator-helpers-for-conditions
checklist.rule: WHERE conditions use imported operator helpers from 'drizzle-orm' (eq, and, inArray, gt, lt, isNull, etc.) rather than raw SQL strings
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes Drizzle SELECT, UPDATE, or DELETE queries with conditions

checklist.name: desc-asc-for-ordering
checklist.rule: ORDER BY clauses use desc() or asc() helpers from 'drizzle-orm', not bare column references
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes Drizzle queries with ordering

checklist.name: transaction-uses-tx-not-db
checklist.rule: Inside db.transaction(async (tx) => { ... }), ALL database operations use the tx parameter, not the outer db object

checklist.name: transaction-for-multi-table-writes
checklist.rule: Multi-table write operations (insert parent + children) are wrapped in db.transaction()
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes code that creates/updates records across multiple related tables

checklist.name: returning-destructured
checklist.rule: The result of .returning() is destructured as const [row] = await db.insert(...).returning(), not accessed via index
checklist.relevant_when: Agent uses .returning() after insert or update

checklist.name: updated-at-sql-expression
checklist.rule: When updating records, updatedAt is set using sql`datetime('now')` (SQLite) or sql`now()` (PostgreSQL), not a JavaScript Date or ISO string
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes Drizzle UPDATE queries on tables with updatedAt columns

checklist.name: upsert-with-on-conflict
checklist.rule: Upserts use .onConflictDoUpdate({ target, set }) for atomic insert-or-update, not a check-then-insert pattern which has race conditions
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes code that needs to insert a record or update it if it already exists

checklist.name: batch-insert-with-values-array
checklist.rule: Multiple rows are inserted in a single db.insert(table).values([...]) call using an array, not individual insert calls in a loop
checklist.relevant_when: Agent needs to insert multiple records at once

checklist.name: infer-types-from-schema
checklist.rule: TypeScript types for rows use InferSelectModel<typeof table> and InferInsertModel<typeof table> from 'drizzle-orm', not manually duplicated interfaces
checklist.relevant_when: Agent defines TypeScript types for Drizzle table rows

checklist.name: money-as-cents-in-queries
checklist.rule: Money/price values in insert/update data use integer cents, consistent with the schema definition
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes queries that create or update monetary values
